channel.title: linux on Paginton.cloud
channel.description: Recent content in linux on Paginton.cloud

item.title: Dual booting Ubuntu and Windows 10 - Surface Book
item.description: I’m not exactly a Linux newbie but nor can I claim be at sysadmin level of Linux knowledge. Linux however, is a definite area I want to improve my knowledge and skills in. I wanted Ubuntu as my daily OS but a VM on my laptop just wasn’t doing it for me. I therefore decided to have my Surface Book dual boot Ubuntu 18.04 and Windows. Turns out this was fairly simple to accomplish.
